venues.name: Dreams Royal Beach Punta Cana
venues.notes: All-inclusive Dreams Resorts & Spas property (World of Hyatt Inclusive Collection). Taxes & gratuities included in all romance packages. Must book min. 30 days in advance. Prices shown are Dec 21, 2026–Dec 20, 2027, Mon–Wed (lowest tier). Thu–Sun and Nov–Jul dates are higher — ask coordinator for full matrix.

packages.name: Elope in Luxury
includes: Service of a dedicated on-site wedding coordinator
Sparkling wine & fresh fruit in room/suite upon arrival
Hairstyling & makeup application for one member of the wedding couple
Bouquet(s) and/or boutonniere(s) for the wedding couple
Preparation and ironing of couple's wedding day attire
Symbolic ceremony (officiant NOT included)
20 digital photos of the wedding ceremony
Wedding cake and sparkling wine toast for two
Romantic dining arrangements for two the night of the ceremony
Special turndown service the night of the wedding
15% off spa treatments (boutique purchases not included)
Complimentary hydrotherapy circuit treatment for the couple
Breakfast-in-bed with mimosas (concierge reservation required)
Late check-out for the couple (based on availability)
Free anniversary nights (2 free nights with 5+ paid nights on anniversary)
Complimentary room upgrade for the couple (based on availability)
Package for 2 pax ONLY — cannot be combined with other complimentary packages

packages.name: Infinitely Yours (Vow Renewal)
includes: Wedding organization and personal touch of on-site coordinator
Vow renewal ceremony
Corsage(s) and/or boutonniere(s) for the wedding couple
Sparkling wine toast for two
Certificate of renewed vows
Special dining arrangements for two the evening of ceremony
Anniversary Package: welcome letter, fresh fruit, bottle of sparkling wine
Special turndown service one evening during stay
Breakfast in bed with mimosas (concierge reservation required)
15% off spa treatments (boutique purchases not included)
COMPLIMENTARY when booking 5+ nights in Preferred Club Junior Suite Swim Out or higher
Extra pax (max 6): $5/chair, $5/sparkling wine toast

packages.name: Wedding in Paradise
includes: Symbolic ceremony (performed by on-site coordinator)
Wedding organization and personal touch of on-site coordinator
Preparation and ironing of couple's wedding day attire
Complimentary room for one member of the couple the night before the wedding (based on availability)
Bouquet(s) and/or boutonniere(s) for the wedding couple
Wedding cake and sparkling wine toast (up to 10 guests)
Special turndown service the night of the wedding
15% off spa treatments (boutique purchases not included)
Newlywed Package: welcome letter, fresh fruit, bottle of sparkling wine, breakfast in bed with mimosas
Late checkout for the couple (based on availability)
Free anniversary nights (2 free with 5+ paid nights, or 1 free with 4 paid)
Set up: 10 chairs with ceremonial table
COMPLIMENTARY with 7+ nights Preferred Club Jr Suite Swim Out or higher, OR 5 rooms (any category) for 3+ nights
Extra pax: $5/chair, $5/sparkling wine, $10/cake

packages.name: Eternal Love
includes: Service of judge or minister
Semi-private rehearsal dinner for up to 20 (set menu required)
Wedding organization and personal touch of on-site coordinator
Preparation and ironing of couple's wedding day attire
Complimentary room for one member of the couple the night before
Bouquet(s) and/or boutonniere(s) for the wedding couple
Two boutonnieres and two corsages for the wedding party
Sound system with speaker and microphones
Hairstyling & makeup application for one member of the couple
Ceremony décor: 20 white Avant garden chairs, ceremonial table, tropical floral centerpiece, aisle runner
Wedding cake and sparkling wine for up to 20 guests
Private cocktail hour with hors d'oeuvres — Gold menu, up to 20 guests (3 high cocktail tables)

Private dinner reception — Gold menu, up to 20 guests (round tables, white linens, white folding chairs, standard glassware & silverware, sweetheart table with tropical floral centerpiece, cake table, guest book table)
One natural floral centerpiece for the sweetheart table
One natural floral centerpiece for the ceremonial table
Live music — one set during cocktail hour
Special turndown service the night of the wedding
15% off spa treatments (boutique purchases not included)
Newlywed Package: welcome letter, fresh fruit, sparkling wine, breakfast in bed with mimosas
Late checkout for the couple (based on availability)
50 full-color photos and wedding album
Video of ceremony (30 minutes)
Choice of one couple's spa treatment
Free anniversary nights (2 free with 5+ paid nights, or 1 free with 4 paid)

packages.name: Beyond Memorable
includes: Wedding organization and personal touch of on-site coordinator
Welcome cocktail party — 1 hour event
Hors d'oeuvres station (4 selections) + 1 hour open bar
Rehearsal dinner — 2 hour event
Signature cocktail selected by the couple
Sumptuous buffet with choice of cuisine options
Dessert station (2 options)
Appetizers station (3 options)
Symbolic ceremony (private event)
Preparation and ironing of couple's wedding day attire
Beach pergola or wedding gazebo drapery
Bouquet(s) and/or boutonniere(s) for the wedding couple
White-linen covered chairs for guests
Shoe check station (for beach ceremonies)
Wedding reception — 3 hour private event
Sweetheart table for the couple with upgraded linens
Sound system with speaker and microphone
Delectable buffet with variety of cuisine options
Private bar with bartender
Dessert station and couple's choice of wedding cake
Sparkling wine & fresh fruit for the couple and their parents (up to 3 rooms)
20% off spa treatments for couple and parents (up to 6 people)
Complimentary hydrotherapy access for couple and parents on one day
Complimentary room for one member of the couple the night before
Romantic turndown service the evening of the wedding
Romantic breakfast in bed with mimosas the day after
Late checkout for the couple (based on availability, until 3pm)
Free anniversary nights
$100 resort coupons per guest
Prices include up to 79 guests — buffet style dinner only
Requires minimum 75 cumulative paid room nights

addons.name: Sea Side Grill Restaurant Location Fee
addons.description: Required for Sea Side Grill — not included in packages. 100 pax max, 11 tables, wheelchair accessible, receptions 7pm–11pm. Lighting recommended.

addons.name: Mangrove Gazebo Location Fee
addons.description: Required for Mangrove Gazebo if using Wedding in Paradise, Elope Luxury, or Infinitely Yours package. 80 pax max, wheelchair access, ceremony/cocktail only, available until 7pm.

addons.name: WBA Studio Photo – Larimar
addons.description: 1.5hr coverage. Ceremony & photo session. 70 digital photos, online gallery, ready in 4-6 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Photo – Passion of Love
addons.description: 3hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session. 130 digital photos, online gallery, ready in 4-6 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Photo – Gold Secrets
addons.description: 5hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session, beginning of reception. 220 digital photos, online gallery, ready in 4-6 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Photo – Luxury
addons.description: 7hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session, full reception. 400 digital photos, online gallery, ready in 4-6 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Photo – Pearl
addons.description: 7hr, 2 photographers. All digital photos + Wedding Album 8x10. Online gallery, ready in 4-8 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio – Extra Photography Hour
addons.description: Add one additional hour of photo coverage.

addons.name: WBA Studio – Wedding Album 8x10 Hard Cover
addons.description: Add-on album for any photo package.

addons.name: WBA Studio – Trash the Dress Session
addons.description: Separate TTD photo session.

addons.name: WBA Studio – Sunrise Trash the Dress Session
addons.description: Sunrise TTD session.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Ceremony
addons.description: Up to 30min ceremony coverage. 1 videographer. Online download, ready in 2-4 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Ambar
addons.description: 3hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session recording. Online download, ready in 2-4 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Diamond
addons.description: 5hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session, beginning of reception. Online download, ready in 2-4 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Platinum
addons.description: 7hr coverage. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session, full reception. Online download, ready in 2-4 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Cinematic Love
addons.description: 7hr, 2 videographers. Getting ready, ceremony, photo session, reception. Drone + highlight reel (3-5 min). Online download, ready in 4-6 weeks.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Highlight Reel Add-on
addons.description: Add a highlight video to any video package.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Drone Service
addons.description: Add drone footage to any video package.

addons.name: WBA Studio Video – Raw Footage
addons.description: Add raw video footage to any video package.

addons.name: Extra Guest – Cocktail Hour
addons.description: Eternal Love / Beyond Memorable: $18 + 28% taxes = ~$23/person. Children 3-12: ~$12.

addons.name: Extra Guest – Sit-Down Dinner
addons.description: Eternal Love / Beyond Memorable: $40 + 28% taxes = ~$51/person. Children 3-12: ~$26.

addons.name: Extra Guest – Buffet Dinner
addons.description: Beyond Memorable: $50 + 28% taxes = ~$64/person. Children 3-12: ~$32.
